title: F3 Command
description: Adds a command to emulate pressing the F3 keybinds
body:
# F3 Command
An incredibly simple mod that adds one command: `/f3`.

### why?
- you don't have to remember all the random combinations, autocomplete does that for you
- you don't have to play twister with your fingers every time you want to see hitboxes
- mac users rejoice! you no longer have to deal with the pain of system keybinds conflicting with F3 and messing up all your windows

uhhh yeah that's about it
